title: California Surpasses 2.5 Million ZEV Sales
content: California Energy Commission (CEC) announced that California surpassed 2.5 million cumulative new zero-emission vehicle (ZEV) sales in 2025. Since the end of 2019, cumulative new ZEV sales in California alone have grown over 300%, driven by effective clean transportation policy and various ZEV incentives.  This remarkable growth has also driven the stateГўв‚¬в„ўs commitment to building a robust ZEV infrastructure network. Гўв‚¬Е“No state in the union can match CaliforniaГўв‚¬в„ўs five-year growth in ZEV sales,Гўв‚¬Вќ said California Energy Commissioner Nancy Skinner. Гўв‚¬Е“This serves as a reminder of how far weГўв‚¬в„ўve come thanks to historic levels of state investment and CaliforniansГўв‚¬в„ў strong demand for clean cars. Each quarter, even in the face of increasing federal headwinds, tens of thousands of consumers are purchasing a ZEV in the Golden State, enjoying a great driving experience, and knowing they never have to go to a gas station again.Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“While the federal government reversed and put up roadblocks, the global zero-emission vehicle market surged ahead last year,Гўв‚¬Вќ said California Air Resources Board Chair Lauren Sanchez. "Governor NewsomГўв‚¬в„ўs new rebate proposal sends a clear message: California isnГўв‚¬в„ўt slowing down, weГўв‚¬в„ўre still leading the pack. ItГўв‚¬в„ўs not just about clean air, itГўв‚¬в„ўs smart economic policy.Гўв‚¬Вќ
